summary: A stellar 1981 performance highlighted by an outstanding "Cumberland Blues" and a ripping "Estimated Prophet," recorded from the soundboard with clear, vibrant sound despite some early flubs and EQ quirks.
review: The three reviewers unanimously award five stars, praising Jerry’s ferocious guitar work and a consistently high‑energy set that includes a legendary rendition of Cumberland Blues and an emphatic Estimated Prophet. The SBD source is described as crisp and sparkling, though one reviewer notes early feedback hiccups, pitch mismatches and a middle‑rich EQ that benefits from a slight adjustment.

ai_rating.rationale: All three reviews are five‑star and focus on superb musical performance with only minor technical caveats, indicating an exceptional show and very good recording quality.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Overall clear and sparkling sound; early flubs, feedback problems, and pitch‑mismatch patches noted. EQ is flat and a bit middle‑rich – recommend dialing down mids by ~2 dB and boosting the ends slightly.

show_quality.setlist_flow: High‑octane, consistently tight performance from start to finish; Jerry’s “balls‑to‑the‑walls” playing drives the band forward with relentless energy.

band_member_comments.Jerry: Described as "balls‑to‑the‑walls, pedal‑to‑the‑metal" throughout – a ferocious, standout guitar performance.
